emails.subject: Gas Natural Mexico
emails.body: Tana, Another deal was executed on 8/25/00 with Gas Natural Mexico (#NW9602). Can we have this deal roll up under the pending Deemed ISDA and Gty that their parent was to issue ENA (Use Credit Previously Provided)? Give me a call at x6-6002 if you have any questions. Thanks, Veronica Forwarded by Veronica Espinoza/Corp/Enron on 08/29/2000 10:20 AM From: Veronica Espinoza 08/24/2000 04:13 PM

emails.subject: Re: Gas Natural Mexico
emails.body: Re: Gas Natural Mexico Souad, We can use the Deemed ISDA format I already sent you. And the guarantees (when we get them) should work for allfinancial transactions. Veronica Espinoza@ENRON 08/29/2000 10:27 AM
